controls.control_objective: To ensure activities
controls.control_description: Chapter VI - Financial Conduct and Prohibited Activities .....................................................
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks
- Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') operating in india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') operating in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') operating in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks and
Central Co-operative Banks, unless specified otherwise, as defined in the National
Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined in the individual chapters below, shall have the
same meaning as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act,
1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by the RBI, or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory m

controls.control_objective: To ensure have separate board-approved policies relating to the following areas: (1) 'mandatory leave' as specified in paragraph 45 of these directions
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have separate Board-approved policies relating to the following areas:
(1) 'Mandatory Leave' as specified in paragraph 45 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have separate board-approved policies relating to the following areas: (1) 'mandatory leave' as specified in paragraph 45 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and update policies in respect of 'mandatory leave' and bcp periodically as set out in paragraph 45 and 48(1) respectively of these directions
controls.control_description:
The Board of a bank shall review and update policies in respect of 'mandatory leave'
and BCP periodically as set out in paragraph 45 and 48(1) respectively of these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and update policies in respect of 'mandatory leave' and bcp periodically as set out in paragraph 45 and 48(1) respectively of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure also review the report prepared by its top management regarding the adequacy of the bank's bcp in terms of instructions contained in paragraph 48(2) o
controls.control_description:
It shall also review the report prepared by its top management regarding
the adequacy of the bank's BCP in terms of instructions contained in paragraph 48(2)
of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also review the report prepared by its top management regarding the adequacy of the bank's bcp in terms of instructions contained in paragraph 48(2) o

controls.control_objective: To ensure deposit the amounts to be credited to the fund in the specified account maintained with rbi
controls.control_description:
Chapter III - Depositor Education and Awareness Fund
Explanation: A bank shall deposit the amounts to be credited to the Fund in the
specified account maintained with RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deposit the amounts to be credited to the fund in the specified account maintained with rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'committee' means the committee constituted under the fund
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'committee' means the committee constituted under the fund

controls.control_objective: To ensure 24, 2014, hereinafter referred to as the scheme
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 24, 2014, hereinafter referred to as the scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure liquidator of a bank appointed under any law for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Liquidator' means liquidator of a bank appointed under any law for the time
being in force;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to liquidator of a bank appointed under any law for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure the amount, including interest, transferred by a bank to the fund in terms of section 26a of the act
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Principal amount' means the amount, including interest, transferred by a bank
to the Fund in terms of Section 26A of the Act;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the amount, including interest, transferred by a bank to the fund in terms of section 26a of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure any credit balances in any account or any deposit in a bank remaining unclaimed or inoperative for ten years or more
controls.control_description:
and
(5) 'Amount due' means any credit balances in any account or any deposit in a bank
remaining unclaimed or inoperative for ten years or more.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any credit balances in any account or any deposit in a bank remaining unclaimed or inoperative for ten years or more

controls.control_objective: To ensure credit to the fund the credit balance in any of the deposit account maintained with the bank which have not been operated upon for ten years or more
controls.control_description:
A bank shall credit to the Fund the credit balance in any of the deposit account
maintained with the bank which have not been operated upon for ten years or more,
or any amount remaining unclaimed for ten years or more, as applicable to the
banking entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to credit to the fund the credit balance in any of the deposit account maintained with the bank which have not been operated upon for ten years or more

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer to the fund the entire amount as specified in the above paragraph, including the accrued interest that the bank would have been required to p
controls.control_description:
A bank shall transfer to the Fund the entire amount as specified in the above
paragraph, including the accrued interest that the bank would have been required to
pay to the customer / depositor as on the date of transfer to the Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer to the fund the entire amount as specified in the above paragraph, including the accrued interest that the bank would have been required to p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged to the fund
controls.control_description:
Any expenditure incurred for the promotion of depositors' education, awareness,
interests and other purposes that may be specified by RBI under Section 26A (4) of
the Act, shall be charged to the Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged to the fund

controls.control_objective: To ensure repay the customer / depositor, along with interest if applicable, and lodge a claim for refund from the fund for an equivalent amount paid to the cus
controls.control_description:
In case of demand from a customer / depositor (or legal heirs in case of deceased
depositors) whose unclaimed amount / deposit had been transferred to the Fund, a
bank shall repay the customer / depositor, along with interest if applicable, and lodge
a claim for refund from the Fund for an equivalent amount paid to the customer /
depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to repay the customer / depositor, along with interest if applicable, and lodge a claim for refund from the fund for an equivalent amount paid to the cus

controls.control_objective: To ensure accrue only from the date on which the balance in an account was transferred to the fund to the date of payment to the customer / depositor
controls.control_description:
The interest payable, if any, from the Fund on a claim shall accrue only from the date
on which the balance in an account was transferred to the Fund to the date of
payment to the customer / depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accrue only from the date on which the balance in an account was transferred to the fund to the date of payment to the customer / depositor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payable in respect of amounts refunded from the fund, in respect of which no interest was payable by the bank to its customer / depositor
controls.control_description:
No interest shall be payable in respect of
amounts refunded from the Fund, in respect of which no interest was payable by the
bank to its customer / depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payable in respect of amounts refunded from the fund, in respect of which no interest was payable by the bank to its customer / depositor

controls.control_objective: To ensure calculate the interest payable (by a bank to its depositors / claimants) on principal amount of unclaimed interest bearing deposits transferred to the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall calculate the interest payable (by a bank to its depositors / claimants) on
principal amount of unclaimed interest bearing deposits transferred to the Fund at the
rate of 4 percent per annum up to June 30, 2018, 3.5 percent w.e.f.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to calculate the interest payable (by a bank to its depositors / claimants) on principal amount of unclaimed interest bearing deposits transferred to the

controls.control_objective: To ensure 10, 2021 and at 3 percent with effect from may 11, 2021 till the time of payment to the depositor / claimant
controls.control_description:
July 1, 2018 up
to May 10, 2021 and at 3 percent with effect from May 11, 2021 till the time of payment
to the depositor / claimant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 10, 2021 and at 3 percent with effect from may 11, 2021 till the time of payment to the depositor / claimant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
Changes to the rate of interest, if any, payable on the
principal amount transferred to the Fund shall be specified by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated in the manner specified in paragraph 13 of these directions and by rounding off the amount of interest to the nearest rupee
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The amount of interest payable in this behalf shall be calculated in the
manner specified in paragraph 13 of these Directions and by rounding off the amount
of interest to the nearest rupee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated in the manner specified in paragraph 13 of these directions and by rounding off the amount of interest to the nearest rupee

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay to the liquidator, an amount equal to the amount that could have been claimed from dicgc with respect to such deposits, and with respect to all ot
controls.control_description:
In the case of a bank under liquidation, during the pendency of the liquidation
proceedings, if any claim is received from depositors whose deposits were covered
by DICGC insurance at the time of transfer to the Fund, the Fund shall pay to the
liquidator, an amount equal to the amount that could have been claimed from DICGC
with respect to such deposits, and with respect to all other amounts paid by the
liquidator towards the amounts transferred to the Fund, whether insured by DICGC
or not, the Fund shall reimburse the liquidator.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay to the liquidator, an amount equal to the amount that could have been claimed from dicgc with respect to such deposits, and with respect to all ot

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim as per the following procedure: (1) scenario 1: claim on deposits covered by dicgc - if the deposits of a customer / depositor were c
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In the case of a bank under liquidation, the depositor has to approach
the Liquidator of the bank for claim and the Liquidator shall settle the claim as per the
following procedure:
(1) Scenario 1: Claim on Deposits Covered by DICGC - If the deposits of a
customer / depositor were covered by DICGC insurance at the time of transfer
to the DEA Fund, then the Liquidator can claim an amount equivalent to what
could have been claimed from DICGC, and then make payment to the depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the claim as per the following procedure: (1) scenario 1: claim on deposits covered by dicgc - if the deposits of a customer / depositor were c

controls.control_objective: To ensure claim the amount in excess of dicgc insurance cover only on reimbursement basis i
controls.control_description:
If the above deposit amount is more than the insurance cover of DICGC, then
the Liquidator shall claim the amount in excess of DICGC insurance cover only
on reimbursement basis i.e., the Liquidator shall pay such amount to the
depositor subject to meeting all the applicable requirements and thereafter
submit a claim to DEA Fund for reimbursement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to claim the amount in excess of dicgc insurance cover only on reimbursement basis i

controls.control_objective: To ensure expeditiously register itself as a pre- requisite to remit the unclaimed amounts due and submit refund claims, as defined in the scheme, in electronic
controls.control_description:
Registration in e-Kuber System: A bank, if not already registered under the DEA
Fund Module of the e-Kuber system, shall expeditiously register itself as a pre-
requisite to remit the unclaimed amounts due and submit refund claims, as defined in
the Scheme, in electronic form through e-Kuber system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to expeditiously register itself as a pre- requisite to remit the unclaimed amounts due and submit refund claims, as defined in the scheme, in electronic

controls.control_objective: To ensure share two e-mail ids with dea
controls.control_description:
A member bank, i.e., a bank
with direct access to the e-Kuber system, shall share two e-mail ids with
dea.fund@rbi.org.in to complete the registration process while a non-member bank
shall provide two e-mail ids to its sponsor bank to complete the registration process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share two e-mail ids with dea

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent only to the two e-mail ids registered in the e-kuber system
controls.control_description:
On completion of registration process, further communication from RBI shall be sent
only to the two e-mail ids registered in the e-Kuber system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent only to the two e-mail ids registered in the e-kuber system

controls.control_objective: To ensure designate up to a maximum of 10 officers as authorised signatories to operate the bank's dea fund account jointly, who shall be responsible for author
controls.control_description:
Authorised Signatories: A bank shall designate up to a maximum of 10 officers as
authorised signatories to operate the bank's DEA Fund account jointly, who shall be
responsible for authorising the applicable returns under the DEA Fund Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to designate up to a maximum of 10 officers as authorised signatories to operate the bank's dea fund account jointly, who shall be responsible for author

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to rbi a certified true copy of the resolution / decision / authorisation (in hindi or english) of the board / md&ceo / ed / committee of execu
controls.control_description:
It
shall submit to RBI a certified true copy of the Resolution / Decision / Authorisation
(in Hindi or English) of the Board / MD&CEO / ED / Committee of Executives
empowered for the purpose along with the list of authorised signatories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to rbi a certified true copy of the resolution / decision / authorisation (in hindi or english) of the board / md&ceo / ed / committee of execu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished in the prescribed format (annex i), with details of both resolution / decision / authorisation and specimen signatures of all the authori
controls.control_description:
Any update
in the authorised officials shall be furnished in the prescribed format (Annex I), with
details of both Resolution / Decision / Authorisation and specimen signatures of all
the authorised signatories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished in the prescribed format (annex i), with details of both resolution / decision / authorisation and specimen signatures of all the authori

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to submit details of all such authorised signatories and their specimen signatures to rbi, instead of furnishing only the additions or deletion
controls.control_description:
Explanation: A bank, while communicating the changes made, shall ensure to submit
details of all such authorised signatories and their specimen signatures to RBI,
instead of furnishing only the additions or deletions made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ensure to submit details of all such authorised signatories and their specimen signatures to rbi, instead of furnishing only the additions or deletion

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer to the fund, the amounts becoming due in each calendar month (i
controls.control_description:
Procedure for Transferring Unclaimed Amount to the Fund: A bank shall transfer
to the Fund, the amounts becoming due in each calendar month (i.e., proceeds of the
inoperative accounts and balances remaining unclaimed for 10 years or more) as
specified in paragraph 10 of these Directions, i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer to the fund, the amounts becoming due in each calendar month (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all legal obligations relating to the same, till that date, including those pertaining to taxes deductible and payable, are met or adequat
controls.control_description:
Before transferring the amount due to the Fund, the bank shall
ensure that all legal obligations relating to the same, till that date, including those
pertaining to taxes deductible and payable, are met or adequate arrangements are
made for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all legal obligations relating to the same, till that date, including those pertaining to taxes deductible and payable, are met or adequat

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer to the fund, the entire amount due through e-kuber system under the module "dea fund services"
controls.control_description:
(1) Member Bank's Own Account - A member bank shall transfer to the Fund, the
entire amount due through e-Kuber system under the module "DEA Fund
Services".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer to the fund, the entire amount due through e-kuber system under the module "dea fund services"

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish its dea fund code in the "bank dea fund code" field and the detailed breakup (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz
controls.control_description:
When a member bank is crediting amount due to the Fund, it shall
furnish its DEA Fund Code in the "Bank DEA Fund Code" field and the detailed
breakup (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz., interest bearing
deposits, non-interest bearing deposits and other credits, which also includes
non-interest bearing amount (i.e., any amount other than deposits remaining
unclaimed as mentioned in paragraph 9 of these Directions), in the fields
provided for the same in the e-Kuber system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish its dea fund code in the "bank dea fund code" field and the detailed breakup (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure consolidate but separately remit the amount bank-wise to the fund, by indicating appropriate bank dea fund code of the other (non-member) bank in the
controls.control_description:
(2) Other Bank's (Non-member) Account - In case a sponsor bank is remitting
the amounts due of non-member banks, it shall not consolidate but separately
remit the amount bank-wise to the Fund, by indicating appropriate Bank DEA
Fund Code of the other (non-member) bank in the field provided in the e-Kuber.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consolidate but separately remit the amount bank-wise to the fund, by indicating appropriate bank dea fund code of the other (non-member) bank in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure also provide the detailed break-up (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz
controls.control_description:
It shall also provide the detailed break-up (number of accounts and amount) of
the deposits, viz., interest-bearing deposits, non-interest bearing deposits and
other credits in the respective fields, i.e., the fields designated for the same, in
the e-Kuber system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also provide the detailed break-up (number of accounts and amount) of the deposits, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure correctness of the amount and transfer unclaimed amounts / deposits to the fund through e-kuber during the last five working days of every mont
controls.control_description:
Window for transferring unclaimed amount and submission of claim
(1) Deposit Window: A bank shall ensure correctness of the amount and transfer
unclaimed amounts / deposits to the Fund through e-Kuber during the last five
working days of every month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure correctness of the amount and transfer unclaimed amounts / deposits to the fund through e-kuber during the last five working days of every mont

controls.control_objective: To ensure effect only one transfer of unclaimed amounts per month
controls.control_description:
A bank (including a non-member bank) shall effect
only one transfer of unclaimed amounts per month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to effect only one transfer of unclaimed amounts per month

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer the unclaimed amounts / deposits to its sponsor bank (through normal banking channel), sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the
controls.control_description:
A non-member bank shall
transfer the unclaimed amounts / deposits to its sponsor bank (through normal
banking channel), sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the sponsor
bank to transfer the same to the Fund through e-Kuber system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer the unclaimed amounts / deposits to its sponsor bank (through normal banking channel), sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure correctness of the amount and submit claim from the fund in e-kuber system during the first 10 working days of every month
controls.control_description:
(2) Claim Window: A bank shall ensure correctness of the amount and submit
claim from the Fund in e-Kuber system during the first 10 working days of every
month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ensure correctness of the amount and submit claim from the fund in e-kuber system during the first 10 working days of every month

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit only one consolidated claim per month
controls.control_description: A bank shall submit only one consolidated claim per month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit only one consolidated claim per month

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the claim to its sponsor bank sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the sponsor bank to submit the same to rbi through e-kuber sys
controls.control_description:
A non-
member bank shall submit the claim to its sponsor bank sufficiently in advance
of the due date, to enable the sponsor bank to submit the same to RBI through
e-Kuber system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the claim to its sponsor bank sufficiently in advance of the due date, to enable the sponsor bank to submit the same to rbi through e-kuber sys

controls.control_objective: To ensure repay the customer / depositor, along with interest
controls.control_description:
Procedure for Submitting Claim
(1) In case of demand from a customer / depositor, whose unclaimed amount /
deposit had been transferred to the Fund, a bank shall repay the customer /
depositor, along with interest, if applicable, and thereafter, lodge a claim for
refund from the Fund for an equivalent amount paid to the customer / depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to repay the customer / depositor, along with interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure repay the customer accordingly by making the account operative and keep the remaining amount (including the interest
controls.control_description:
In case of any claim made by the customer / depositor for refund of only part
amount, the bank shall repay the customer accordingly by making the account
operative and keep the remaining amount (including the interest, if any) in the
account, and thereafter lodge a claim for the entire amount from the Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to repay the customer accordingly by making the account operative and keep the remaining amount (including the interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks
controls.control_description: Explanation: A bank may refer Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an appropriate internal operational procedure for the fund which should specifically address error prevention mechanisms and rectification proces
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have an appropriate internal operational procedure for the Fund which
should specifically address error prevention mechanisms and rectification processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have an appropriate internal operational procedure for the fund which should specifically address error prevention mechanisms and rectification proces

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a maker-checker process to verify all deposit and claim entries for processing the entries
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, the bank shall implement a Maker-Checker process to verify all deposit
and claim entries for processing the entries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a maker-checker process to verify all deposit and claim entries for processing the entries

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately report to rbi any errors, including: (1) specific reasons for the error, (2) details of checks and controls implemented to prevent recurre
controls.control_description:
A bank shall immediately report to RBI any errors, including:
(1) specific reasons for the error,
(2) details of checks and controls implemented to prevent recurrence, and
(3) assurance that such errors will not recur.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately report to rbi any errors, including: (1) specific reasons for the error, (2) details of checks and controls implemented to prevent recurre

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit in original (unless specified otherwise), the following returns duly certified by the specified auditors to depositor education and awareness (
controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit in original (unless specified otherwise), the following returns duly
certified by the specified auditors to Depositor Education and Awareness (DEA) Fund,
Department of Regulation, Central Office, 12th Floor, Nariman Bhavan, Vinay K Shah
Marg, Nariman Point, Mumbai - 400021, as also scanned copy in pdf form by email
to dea.fund@rbi.org.in:
(1) Form I - Monthly Statement: At the end of every month, irrespective of transfer
of deposits, the e-Kuber system will auto generate a Form I (Annex II) for a
bank (including a non-member bank) and send it to their registered e-mail ids.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit in original (unless specified otherwise), the following returns duly certified by the specified auditors to depositor education and awareness (

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the same online to rbi through e-kuber system
controls.control_description:
A bank (or sponsor bank on behalf of its non-member bank), after verifying the
correctness of Form I, shall submit the same online to RBI through e-Kuber
system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the same online to rbi through e-kuber system

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring the same to the notice of rbi by submitting the relevant rectification form duly signed by the two authorised officials and certified by the ban
controls.control_description:
(2) Rectification Form: If a bank (sponsor bank in case of non-member bank) does
not agree with the balances given in the Form I with regard to the details of
transfers made / claims received including non-receipt of confirmation
messages, then it shall bring the same to the notice of RBI by submitting the
relevant rectification form duly signed by the two authorised officials and
certified by the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent), by post and/or email,
within two weeks from identification of such discrepancy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bring the same to the notice of rbi by submitting the relevant rectification form duly signed by the two authorised officials and certified by the ban

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its rectification requests in the prescribed forms, as under:
controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit its
rectification requests in the prescribed forms, as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its rectification requests in the prescribed forms, as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , for independent and periodical verification of the balances, at the end of march and september every year, prepare and keep on record a reconciliati
controls.control_description:
(3) Form III - Reconciliation Certificate: A bank shall, for independent and
periodical verification of the balances, at the end of March and September every
year, prepare and keep on record a Reconciliation Certificate (RC) - Form III
(Annex VII) signed by two senior officers, other than those involved in transfer
and refund claims for unclaimed deposits, and countersigned by the bank's
auditors (internal / concurrent), certifying that the balances of the bank as shown
in its general ledger tally with the amount reflected in the Fund account of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , for independent and periodical verification of the balances, at the end of march and september every year, prepare and keep on record a reconciliati

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared and completed with auditor(s) certification within a period of one month from the end of every half-year, i
controls.control_description:
This certificate shall be prepared and completed with auditor(s) certification
within a period of one month from the end of every half-year, i.e., April 30 and
October 31 respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared and completed with auditor(s) certification within a period of one month from the end of every half-year, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure note that submission of a copy of the latest half-year rc (form iii) to rbi is required, only whenever a first claim of the half- year is made by the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall note that submission of a copy of the latest
half-year RC (Form III) to RBI is required, only whenever a first claim of the half-
year is made by the banks and shall be submitted in Form III, which shall contain
Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN) or Internal Document
Identification Number of the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to note that submission of a copy of the latest half-year rc (form iii) to rbi is required, only whenever a first claim of the half- year is made by the

controls.control_objective: To ensure take on record / account the transactions in its books on actual basis, i
controls.control_description:
To avoid any
kind of avoidable discrepancies in reconciliation of the balances in the Fund, a
bank shall take on record / account the transactions in its books on actual basis,
i.e., only after settlement of claim / transfer of amount from / to the DEA Fund
maintained by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take on record / account the transactions in its books on actual basis, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained by a bank, from its statutory auditors in the prescribed format (annex viii)
controls.control_description:
(4) Annual Certificate by Statutory Auditor: An Annual Certificate (AC) indicating
item-wise details of outstanding amount due at the year-end shall be obtained
by a bank, from its Statutory Auditors in the prescribed format (Annex VIII).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained by a bank, from its statutory auditors in the prescribed format (annex viii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi within one month from the date of completion of bank's statutory audit but not later than september 30 of the subsequent financial
controls.control_description:
The
same shall be submitted to RBI within one month from the date of completion of
bank's Statutory Audit but not later than September 30 of the subsequent
financial year for which the AC pertains to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi within one month from the date of completion of bank's statutory audit but not later than september 30 of the subsequent financial

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish the ac, even if it is a 'nil' return, to the rbi within the above stipulated period
controls.control_description:
A bank shall furnish the AC, even if
it is a 'NIL' return, to the RBI within the above stipulated period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish the ac, even if it is a 'nil' return, to the rbi within the above stipulated period

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose all unclaimed liabilities where amount due has been transferred to fund as also the amounts transferred to fund in its financial statements a
controls.control_description:
A bank shall disclose all unclaimed liabilities where amount due has been transferred
to Fund as also the amounts transferred to Fund in its financial statements and / or
under the Notes to Accounts as specified in Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-
operative Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose all unclaimed liabilities where amount due has been transferred to fund as also the amounts transferred to fund in its financial statements a

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure all entries related to fund are audited pre and post submission, signed by both authorised signatories and the bank's auditors (internal / conc
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure all entries related to Fund are audited pre and post submission,
signed by both authorised signatories and the bank's auditors (internal / concurrent).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure all entries related to fund are audited pre and post submission, signed by both authorised signatories and the bank's auditors (internal / conc

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain customer- wise details verified by the concurrent auditors, including payment of up-to-date interest accrued, that has been credited to the d
controls.control_description:
On the date of transferring the amount to the Fund, a bank should maintain customer-
wise details verified by the concurrent auditors, including payment of up-to-date
interest accrued, that has been credited to the deposit account till the date of transfer
to the Fund, with respect to interest bearing deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain customer- wise details verified by the concurrent auditors, including payment of up-to-date interest accrued, that has been credited to the d

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained with the bank
controls.control_description:
With respect to non-interest
bearing deposits and other credits transferred to the Fund, customer-wise details,
duly audited, shall be maintained with the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained with the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also verify and certify that, as per the banks' books, the returns have been correctly compiled by the bank in the monthly and yearly returns submitte
controls.control_description:
The concurrent auditors shall also
verify and certify that, as per the banks' books, the returns have been correctly
compiled by the bank in the monthly and yearly returns submitted to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also verify and certify that, as per the banks' books, the returns have been correctly compiled by the bank in the monthly and yearly returns submitte

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be verified by the statutory auditors at the time of annual audit
controls.control_description:
The above
returns shall also be verified by the statutory auditors at the time of annual audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be verified by the statutory auditors at the time of annual audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure preserve records or documents containing details of all accounts and transactions, including deposit accounts in respect of which amounts are required
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding anything contained in the Banking Companies (Period of
Preservation of Records) Rules, 1985, a bank shall preserve records or documents
containing details of all accounts and transactions, including deposit accounts in
respect of which amounts are required to be credited to the Fund permanently;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preserve records or documents containing details of all accounts and transactions, including deposit accounts in respect of which amounts are required

controls.control_objective: To ensure preserve records or documents in respect of such accounts and transactions, for a period of at least five years from the date of refund from the fund
controls.control_description:
and
where refund has been claimed from the Fund, a bank shall preserve records or
documents in respect of such accounts and transactions, for a period of at least five
years from the date of refund from the Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preserve records or documents in respect of such accounts and transactions, for a period of at least five years from the date of refund from the fund

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) pay the amount due to the fund
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) pay the amount due to the fund

controls.control_objective: To ensure duly furnish the updated contact details (in case of any change) by e- mail to dea
controls.control_description:
The bank shall duly furnish the updated contact details (in case of any change) by e-
mail to dea.fund@rbi.org.in in the prescribed format (Annex IX) for any
correspondence with RBI relating to DEA Fund Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to duly furnish the updated contact details (in case of any change) by e- mail to dea

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the scheme notified in the official gazette on may 24, 2014 for other details
controls.control_description:
A bank may refer to the Scheme notified in the Official Gazette on May 24, 2014 for
other details.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the scheme notified in the official gazette on may 24, 2014 for other details

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to rbi, and the decision of rbi thereon shall be final
controls.control_description:
If any issue arises in the interpretation of the provisions of the Scheme,
the matter shall be referred to RBI, and the decision of RBI thereon shall be final.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to rbi, and the decision of rbi thereon shall be final

controls.control_objective: To ensure also facilitate the process of activation of such accounts by taking an empathetic view as indicated in circular dos
controls.control_description:
The banks may also facilitate the process of activation of such
accounts by taking an empathetic view as indicated in Circular
DoS.CO.PPG.SEC.12/11.01.005/2024-25 dated December 2, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also facilitate the process of activation of such accounts by taking an empathetic view as indicated in circular dos

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the concerned regional office (dor, central office in case of banks coming under the purview of mumbai office) of rbi for grant of no objecti
controls.control_description:
A bank desirous of change in its name shall approach the concerned Regional
Office (DoR, Central Office in case of banks coming under the purview of Mumbai
Office) of RBI for grant of no objection certificate (NOC), clearly stating the
reason(s) for such change (as per format given in Annex X) along with the approval
of the General Body of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the concerned regional office (dor, central office in case of banks coming under the purview of mumbai office) of rbi for grant of no objecti

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit request for change of name and bye-laws, only when these are supported by valid and compelling reason/s for the proposed change
controls.control_description:
Explanations:
(1) A bank shall submit request for change of name and bye-laws, only when
these are supported by valid and compelling reason/s for the proposed
change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit request for change of name and bye-laws, only when these are supported by valid and compelling reason/s for the proposed change

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the discretion to assess whether the reason(s) submitted by the bank are valid and compelling
controls.control_description:
(2) RBI shall have the discretion to assess whether the reason(s) submitted by
the bank are valid and compelling.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the discretion to assess whether the reason(s) submitted by the bank are valid and compelling

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary only in case there is a requirement for 'confirmation' from central / state government, one or more authority / authorities for alteratio
controls.control_description:
Under section 49C read with section 56 of BR Act, 1949, an NOC from RBI shall
be necessary only in case there is a requirement for 'confirmation' from Central /
State Government, one or more authority / authorities for alteration of bye-laws
under the applicable Co-operative Act / Rules.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary only in case there is a requirement for 'confirmation' from central / state government, one or more authority / authorities for alteratio

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the central registrar of co-operative societies (crcs) or registrar of co-operative societies (rcs), as the case may be, for amendment in its
controls.control_description:
A bank shall approach the Central Registrar of Co-operative Societies (CRCS) or
Registrar of Co-operative Societies (RCS), as the case may be, for amendment in
its bye-laws after getting NOC from the concerned office of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the central registrar of co-operative societies (crcs) or registrar of co-operative societies (rcs), as the case may be, for amendment in its

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the concerned regional office of rbi with the following documents: (1) approval of board of directors
controls.control_description:
Once the approval
is obtained from CRCS / RCS, the bank shall apply to the concerned Regional
Office of RBI with the following documents:
(1) approval of Board of Directors;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the concerned regional office of rbi with the following documents: (1) approval of board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure signify its approval to the change of name of any co-operative bank unless the reserve bank certifies in writing that it has no objection to such chan
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The CRCS / RCS shall not signify its approval to the change of name
of any co-operative bank unless the Reserve Bank certifies in writing that it has no
objection to such change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to signify its approval to the change of name of any co-operative bank unless the reserve bank certifies in writing that it has no objection to such chan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintainable unless the reserve bank certifies that there is no objection to such alteration
controls.control_description:
Further, no application for the confirmation of the
alteration of bye-laws of a co-operative bank shall be maintainable unless the
Reserve Bank certifies that there is no objection to such alteration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintainable unless the reserve bank certifies that there is no objection to such alteration

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the above process for change in the name of the bank even if the name change is due to government notification
controls.control_description:
A bank shall follow the above process for change in the name of the bank even if
the name change is due to Government Notification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the above process for change in the name of the bank even if the name change is due to government notification

controls.control_objective: To ensure display / operate with amended name without effecting the corresponding change in its name in the banking licence issued by rbi
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not display / operate with amended name without effecting the
corresponding change in its name in the banking licence issued by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display / operate with amended name without effecting the corresponding change in its name in the banking licence issued by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly as per the name in its banking licence
controls.control_description:
Further,
the displayed name of the bank shall be strictly as per the name in its banking
licence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly as per the name in its banking licence

controls.control_objective: To ensure generally display its full name in any stationery item, publicity material, website, mobile application, advertisement, name board, etc
controls.control_description:
A bank should generally display its full name in any stationery item, publicity
material, website, mobile application, advertisement, name board, etc., and the
same must conform to the name as it appears in the Certificate of Registration
granted by the RCS and the banking licence granted by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generally display its full name in any stationery item, publicity material, website, mobile application, advertisement, name board, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the full name as appearing in the banking licence is also shown along with such abbreviated/abridged name/logo in all publicity materi
controls.control_description:
While the use of abbreviation/abridged name/logo, etc., is permitted as part of the
brand building effort of the bank, it must be ensured that the full name as appearing
in the banking licence is also shown along with such abbreviated/abridged
name/logo in all publicity material/stationery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the full name as appearing in the banking licence is also shown along with such abbreviated/abridged name/logo in all publicity materi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be smaller than the one used for the abbreviated name/abridged name/logo
controls.control_description:
Besides, the font size used for the full
name shall not be smaller than the one used for the abbreviated name/abridged
name/logo.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be smaller than the one used for the abbreviated name/abridged name/logo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prominently displayed in the full name/ abbreviation/abridged name/logo of the bank in equal fonts
controls.control_description:
The words "co-operative bank/ sahakari bank", indicating the nature of
the bank, must be prominently displayed in the full name/ abbreviation/abridged
name/logo of the bank in equal fonts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prominently displayed in the full name/ abbreviation/abridged name/logo of the bank in equal fonts

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank for inclusion in the second
controls.control_description:
StCBs in compliance with ECBA and the following additional norms, may apply to
the Regional Office concerned of the Reserve Bank for inclusion in the Second
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank for inclusion in the second

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the assessed financials and findings of the nabard inspection report or audited financial statements, whichever is the latest
controls.control_description:
The above information shall be based on the assessed financials and findings of
the NABARD inspection report or audited financial statements, whichever is the
latest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be based on the assessed financials and findings of the nabard inspection report or audited financial statements, whichever is the latest

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a copy to nabard, which in turn shall forward it to the regional office of the reserve bank, along with its comments and recommendation in term
controls.control_description:
The StCB shall submit a copy to NABARD, which in turn shall forward it to
the Regional Office of the Reserve Bank, along with its comments and
recommendation in terms of sub-section (6A) of section 42 of the Reserve Bank of
India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a copy to nabard, which in turn shall forward it to the regional office of the reserve bank, along with its comments and recommendation in term

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its application with the following documents: (1) copy of the resolution passed by the annual general body / board of directors to make an appl
controls.control_description:
An eligible StCB shall submit its application with the following
documents:
(1) Copy of the resolution passed by the Annual General Body / Board of
Directors to make an application to RBI for inclusion in the Second Schedule
to the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 and containing the name(s) of bank
official(s) authorized to correspond with RBI in this regard;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its application with the following documents: (1) copy of the resolution passed by the annual general body / board of directors to make an appl

controls.control_objective: To ensure cite or quote from the rbi circular dated april 06, 2018 as it was set aside by the hon'ble supreme court on march 04, 2020 in the matter of writ peti
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not cite or quote from the RBI circular dated April 06, 2018 as it was set
aside by the Hon'ble Supreme Court on March 04, 2020 in the matter of Writ Petition
Explanation: A bank shall, however, continue to carry out customer due diligence
processes in line with regulations governing standards for Know Your Customer
(KYC), Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Combating of Financing of Terrorism (CFT)
and obligations of regulated entities under Prevention of Money Laundering Act,
(PMLA), 2002 in addition to ensuring compliance with relevant provisions under
Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) for overseas remittances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cite or quote from the rbi circular dated april 06, 2018 as it was set aside by the hon'ble supreme court on march 04, 2020 in the matter of writ peti

controls.control_objective: To ensure activities
controls.control_description: Chapter VI - Financial Conduct and Prohibited Activities
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to limits and conditions specified in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of investme
controls.control_description:
Provided that, investments under paragraph 38 and 39 above shall be subject to
limits and conditions specified in Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks
- Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to limits and conditions specified in reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of investme

controls.control_objective: To ensure note that ministry of labour employment and rehabilitation had notified co-operative banks as banking companies for the purposes of section 2(8) of th
controls.control_description:
A bank shall note that Ministry of Labour Employment and Rehabilitation had notified
co-operative banks as banking companies for the purposes of Section 2(8) of the
Payment of Bonus Act, 1965 vide notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to note that ministry of labour employment and rehabilitation had notified co-operative banks as banking companies for the purposes of section 2(8) of th

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept deposits at the instance of private financiers / unincorporated bodies under any arrangement which provides for either the issue of deposit rec
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not accept deposits at the instance of private financiers / unincorporated
bodies under any arrangement which provides for either the issue of deposit receipts
favouring the clients of private financiers or the giving of authority by power of
attorney, nomination or otherwise for such clients to receive such deposits at maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept deposits at the instance of private financiers / unincorporated bodies under any arrangement which provides for either the issue of deposit rec

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to violation of statutory provisions
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, association of
a bank with the deposit acceptance activities of unincorporated bodies may lead
to violation of statutory provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to violation of statutory provisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure associate itself in any manner, either directly or indirectly, with such prize chit schemes floated by any person, company, firm or other association
controls.control_description:
Pursuant to the Prize Chits and Money Circulation Schemes (Banning) Act, 1978
which bans the promotion and conduct of prize-chit schemes and also provides for
deterrent penalties for those who are guilty of breach of the provisions thereof, a bank
shall not associate itself in any manner, either directly or indirectly, with such prize
chit schemes floated by any person, company, firm or other association of individuals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to associate itself in any manner, either directly or indirectly, with such prize chit schemes floated by any person, company, firm or other association

controls.control_objective: To ensure associate itself directly or indirectly with lottery schemes of organisations of any description
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not associate itself directly or indirectly with lottery schemes of
organisations of any description.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to associate itself directly or indirectly with lottery schemes of organisations of any description

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue necessary instructions with respect to directions contained in paragraphs 41 to 43 to its branches for compliance
controls.control_description:
A bank shall issue necessary instructions with respect to Directions contained in
paragraphs 41 to 43 to its branches for compliance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue necessary instructions with respect to directions contained in paragraphs 41 to 43 to its branches for compliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure , as per the board-approved policy referred to in paragraph 6 above, prepare a list of sensitive positions to be covered under 'mandatory leave' requi
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, as per the Board-approved policy referred to in paragraph 6 above,
prepare a list of sensitive positions to be covered under 'mandatory leave'
requirements and the list shall be reviewed periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , as per the board-approved policy referred to in paragraph 6 above, prepare a list of sensitive positions to be covered under 'mandatory leave' requi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compulsorily sent on leave for a few days (not less than 10 working days) in a single spell every year, without giving any prior intimation to thes
controls.control_description:
As per the mandatory leave policy, the employees posted in sensitive positions or
areas of operation shall be compulsorily sent on leave for a few days (not less than
10 working days) in a single spell every year, without giving any prior intimation to
these employees, thereby maintaining an element of surprise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compulsorily sent on leave for a few days (not less than 10 working days) in a single spell every year, without giving any prior intimation to thes

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that employees, while on mandatory leave, do not have access to any physical or virtual resources related to their work responsibilities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that employees, while on mandatory leave, do not have access
to any physical or virtual resources related to their work responsibilities, except
internal / corporate email which is usually available to all employees for general
purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that employees, while on mandatory leave, do not have access to any physical or virtual resources related to their work responsibilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest with the board and the top management of a bank, as specified hereunder: (1) the board shall provide top management clear guidance and direction
controls.control_description:
The responsibility in respect of Business Continuity Planning (BCP) shall rest with the
Board and the top management of a bank, as specified hereunder:
(1) The Board shall provide top management clear guidance and direction in
relation to BCP and fulfil its responsibilities by approving policy on BCP,
prioritizing critical business functions, allocating sufficient resources, reviewing
BCP test results and ensuring maintenance and periodic updation of BCP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest with the board and the top management of a bank, as specified hereunder: (1) the board shall provide top management clear guidance and direction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded for perusal to the chief general manager, nabard, department of supervision (dos), head office, plot no
controls.control_description:
A
copy of the BCP approved by the Board may be forwarded for perusal to the
Chief General Manager, NABARD, Department of Supervision (DoS), Head
Office, Plot No.C-24, 'G' Block, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Post Box No.8121,
Bandra (East), Mumbai 400 051.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded for perusal to the chief general manager, nabard, department of supervision (dos), head office, plot no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for executing such a bcp
controls.control_description:
(2) The top management shall be responsible for executing such a BCP, if
contingency arises.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for executing such a bcp

controls.control_objective: To ensure annually review the adequacy of the institution's business recovery, contingency plans and the test results and put up the same to the board
controls.control_description:
They shall annually review the adequacy of the institution's
business recovery, contingency plans and the test results and put up the same
to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to annually review the adequacy of the institution's business recovery, contingency plans and the test results and put up the same to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure also evaluate the adequacy of contingency planning and their periodic testing by service providers whenever critical operations are outsourced
controls.control_description:
They shall also evaluate the adequacy of contingency planning
and their periodic testing by service providers whenever critical operations are
outsourced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also evaluate the adequacy of contingency planning and their periodic testing by service providers whenever critical operations are outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as a minimum and the onus is on the board and the top management for generating detailed components of bcp in light of individual bank's
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The BCP requirements enunciated in these Directions shall be
considered as a minimum and the onus is on the Board and the Top Management for
generating detailed components of BCP in light of individual bank's activities, systems
and processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as a minimum and the onus is on the board and the top management for generating detailed components of bcp in light of individual bank's

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the guidance note issued vide circular no
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also be guided by the Guidance Note issued vide
Circular No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the guidance note issued vide circular no

controls.control_objective: To ensure 10, 2024
controls.control_description: NB.HO.DoS.Pol./657/J-1/2024-25 dated May 10, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 10, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop an effective bcp that considers and addresses: (1) the potential for wide-area disasters that impact an entire region and for the resulting lo
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop an effective bcp that considers and addresses: (1) the potential for wide-area disasters that impact an entire region and for the resulting lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, inter alia, (1) identification of critical businesses, owned and shared resources with supporting functions (the bcp template)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, inter alia, (1) identification of critical businesses, owned and shared resources with supporting functions (the bcp template)

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate a development plan for the data recovery system (drs) / bcp
controls.control_description:
Based on a sound methodology, a bank shall initiate a development plan for the Data
Recovery System (DRS) / BCP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate a development plan for the data recovery system (drs) / bcp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continuously evaluated and revised whenever the bank forays into new business tools and areas, either as part of a re- engineering process or for i
controls.control_description:
The plan shall be continuously evaluated and revised
whenever the bank forays into new business tools and areas, either as part of a re-
engineering process or for introducing new products and services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continuously evaluated and revised whenever the bank forays into new business tools and areas, either as part of a re- engineering process or for i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be disseminated to all concerned, including the customers, so that awareness would enable them to react positively and in consonance with the bcp
controls.control_description:
The relevant portion of the BCP adopted may also be disseminated to all concerned,
including the customers, so that awareness would enable them to react positively and
in consonance with the BCP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be disseminated to all concerned, including the customers, so that awareness would enable them to react positively and in consonance with the bcp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be confined to information relating to the general readiness of the bank in this regard without any detailed specifics
controls.control_description:
The part of the plan kept in the public domain shall be
confined to information relating to the general readiness of the bank in this regard
without any detailed specifics.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be confined to information relating to the general readiness of the bank in this regard without any detailed specifics

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide an adequate level of comfort and assurance in tackling serious disruptions
controls.control_description:
While a bank may consider cost-effective strategies of BCP, the strategies considered
shall provide an adequate level of comfort and assurance in tackling serious
disruptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide an adequate level of comfort and assurance in tackling serious disruptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be commensurate with the nature and complexity of its business operations
controls.control_description:
Moreover, the mitigating solutions shall be commensurate with the nature
and complexity of its business operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be commensurate with the nature and complexity of its business operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure also consider insurance as a risk mitigation strategy for externalizing risks to a third party so as to reduce financial exposure in the event of disr
controls.control_description:
A bank may also consider insurance as a risk mitigation strategy for externalizing
risks to a third party so as to reduce financial exposure in the event of disruptions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also consider insurance as a risk mitigation strategy for externalizing risks to a third party so as to reduce financial exposure in the event of disr

controls.control_objective: To ensure exercise diligence in regard to the nature of insurance and the certainty of payments
controls.control_description:
However, the bank shall exercise diligence in regard to the nature of insurance and
the certainty of payments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exercise diligence in regard to the nature of insurance and the certainty of payments

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure claim the entire amount transferred to the fund in respect of such depositor along with interest payable
controls.control_description: In the case of any claim for refund of part amount by the depositor whose unclaimed amount/inoperative deposit had been transferred to the Fund, the bank shall claim the entire amount transferred to the Fund in respect of such depositor along with interest payable, if any, from the Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to claim the entire amount transferred to the fund in respect of such depositor along with interest payable
